sql_array: CREATE TABLE sales(    product_id UInt64,    sales_count AggregateFunction(sum, UInt64) DEFAULT initializeAggregation('sumState', toUInt64(0))) ENGINE = AggregatingMergeTree() ORDER BY product_id;
INSERT INTO sales VALUES (1, initializeAggregation('sumState', toUInt64(100))), (2, initializeAggregation('sumState', toUInt64(150));
SELECT product_id, finalizeAggregation(sales_count) FROM sales GROUP BY product_id;

CREATE TABLE temp_sales(    product_id UInt64,    sales_state AggregateFunction(uniq, UInt64) DEFAULT initializeAggregation('uniqState', toUInt64(0))) ENGINE = AggregatingMergeTree() ORDER BY product_id;
INSERT INTO temp_sales VALUES (1, initializeAggregation('uniqState', toUInt64(1))), (1, initializeAggregation('uniqState', toUInt64(2));
